final:
module sata_controller (
    input [3:0] obf_command,
    output reg [3:0] command_out
);
    always @(*) begin
        if (obf_command == 4'b1010) // 0xA in binary
            command_out = ~obf_command; // Invert the obf_command
        else
            command_out = obf_command; // Pass the obf_command unchanged
    end
endmodule
